proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it (positive main effect of pembrolizumab).
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: ORR 0.1739 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.1640 off; logistic coef=0.0702 (OR=1.073), p=0.00329
ORR 0.1695 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.1687 off; logistic coef=0.0057 (OR=1.006), p=0.82
ORR 0.1699 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.1685 off; logistic coef=0.0095 (OR=1.010), p=0.714
ORR 0.1655 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.1704 off; logistic coef=-0.0355 (OR=0.965), p=0.175

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps (worse performance status) is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Higher serum albumin_g_dl is associated with a higher objective_response rate (positive effect).
Higher ldh_u_l (a marker of tumor burden) is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of ecog_ps on ORR = -0.3749 (OR=0.687), p=1.73e-93
Logistic coef of albumin_g_dl on ORR = 0.0907 (OR=1.095), p=0.00014
Logistic coef of ldh_u_l on ORR = 0.0001 (OR=1.000), p=0.505

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Higher crp_mg_l (CRP) is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo (cachexia) is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of nlr on ORR = -0.0050 (OR=0.995), p=0.384
Logistic coef of crp_mg_l on ORR = -0.0049 (OR=0.995), p=0.000688
Logistic coef of weight_loss_pct_6mo on ORR = -0.0385 (OR=0.962), p=1.79e-32

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Patients with liver_mets=1 have a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Patients with bone_mets=1 have a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Patients with stage_iv=1 have a lower objective_response rate than non-stage-IV patients (negative effect).
Patients with pleural_effusion=1 have a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of has_brain_mets on ORR = -0.2521 (OR=0.777), p=2.04e-18
Logistic coef of liver_mets on ORR = 0.0322 (OR=1.033), p=0.331
Logistic coef of bone_mets on ORR = 0.0398 (OR=1.041), p=0.178
Logistic coef of stage_iv on ORR = -0.2951 (OR=0.744), p=1.31e-33
Logistic coef of pleural_effusion on ORR = 0.0051 (OR=1.005), p=0.879

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have a different objective_response rate than males.

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of age_years on ORR = 0.0005 (OR=1.001), p=0.668
Logistic coef of sex_female on ORR = 0.0826 (OR=1.086), p=0.000566

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with squamous histology have a different objective_response rate than adenocarcinoma patients.
Never-smokers have a different objective_response rate than ever-smokers.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with a different objective_response rate.
Current smokers have a different objective_response rate than non-current smokers.

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of histology_squamous on ORR = 0.0469 (OR=1.048), p=0.0762
Logistic coef of smoking_never on ORR = -0.0432 (OR=0.958), p=0.202
Logistic coef of smoking_pack_years on ORR = -0.0002 (OR=1.000), p=0.758
Logistic coef of smoking_current on ORR = 0.0340 (OR=1.035), p=0.19

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response is greater in patients with higher pdl1_tps (positive pembrolizumab×pdl1_tps interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Pembro×PDL1 interaction coef=0.5908, p=1.57e-07. ORR pembro/PDL1>=0.5=0.209 vs no-pembro/PDL1>=0.5=0.156; pembro/PDL1<0.5=0.164 vs no-pembro/PDL1<0.5=0.166

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response is greater in patients with tmb_high=1 than in tmb_high=0 (positive pembrolizumab×tmb_high interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Pembro×TMB-high interaction coef=0.1839, p=0.000415. ORR pembro/TMB-hi=0.197 vs no-pembro/TMB-hi=0.167; pembro/TMB-lo=0.165 vs no-pembro/TMB-lo=0.163

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response is reduced or absent in patients with stk11_mutation=1 (negative pembrolizumab×stk11_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Pembro×STK11 interaction coef=-0.2111, p=0.00178. ORR pembro/STK11-mut=0.158 vs no-pembro/STK11-mut=0.173; pembro/STK11-wt=0.177 vs no-pembro/STK11-wt=0.162

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_osimertinib on objective_response is concentrated in egfr_mutation=1 patients (positive osimertinib×egfr_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Osi×EGFR interaction coef=0.0240, p=0.758. ORR osi/EGFR-mut=0.164 vs no-osi/EGFR-mut=0.166; osi/EGFR-wt=0.166 vs no-osi/EGFR-wt=0.171

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_sotorasib on objective_response is concentrated in kras_g12c=1 patients (positive sotorasib×kras_g12c interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Sotorasib×KRAS-G12C interaction coef=0.0593, p=0.427. ORR sot/KRAS-G12C=0.175 vs no-sot/KRAS-G12C=0.166; sot/KRAS-wt=0.169 vs no-sot/KRAS-wt=0.169

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_olaparib on objective_response is concentrated in brca2_mutation=1 patients (positive olaparib×brca2_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Olaparib×BRCA2 interaction coef=-0.1775, p=0.275. ORR ola/BRCA2-mut=0.146 vs no-ola/BRCA2-mut=0.168; ola/BRCA2-wt=0.171 vs no-ola/BRCA2-wt=0.169

proposed_hypotheses.text: Building on the STK11 result (h9.1), the benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response is also reduced in keap1_mutation=1 patients (negative pembrolizumab×keap1_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Pembro×KEAP1 interaction coef=-0.0580, p=0.363.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Black patients (race_ethnicity=='black') have a different objective_response rate than non-Black patients.
Hispanic patients (race_ethnicity=='hispanic') have a different objective_response rate than non-Hispanic patients.
Patients with insurance_type=='medicaid' have a lower objective_response rate than the rest of the cohort (negative effect).
Uninsured patients (insurance_type=='uninsured') have a lower objective_response rate than the rest of the cohort (negative effect).
Rural-residence patients (rural_residence=1) have a lower objective_response rate than urban patients (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of race_black on ORR = 0.0689 (OR=1.071), p=0.0563
Logistic coef of race_hispanic on ORR = 0.0216 (OR=1.022), p=0.519
Logistic coef of ins_medicaid on ORR = -0.0642 (OR=0.938), p=0.0662
Logistic coef of ins_uninsured on ORR = 0.0078 (OR=1.008), p=0.897
Logistic coef of rural_residence on ORR = -0.0209 (OR=0.979), p=0.487

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment for biomarkers (egfr_mutation, kras_g12c, alk_fusion, stk11_mutation, brca2_mutation, tmb_high, pdl1_tps), ECOG, age, sex, histology, stage, brain/liver mets, treatment_pembrolizumab retains a positive association with objective_response.
After the same multivariable adjustment, treatment_sotorasib does not have a significant main effect on objective_response in the unselected cohort.
After the same multivariable adjustment, treatment_olaparib does not have a significant main effect on objective_response in the unselected cohort.
After the same multivariable adjustment, treatment_osimertinib does not have a significant main effect on objective_response in the unselected cohort.

analyses.code: sm.Logit(y, sm.add_constant(df[adj_cols])).fit()  # adj_cols: 4 treatments + biomarkers + ecog + albumin + ldh + age + sex + histology + stage + brain/liver mets
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted logistic coef of treatment_pembrolizumab on ORR (controlled for biomarkers, ECOG, age, etc) = 0.0771 (OR=1.080), p=0.00135
Adjusted logistic coef of treatment_sotorasib on ORR (controlled for biomarkers, ECOG, age, etc) = 0.0033 (OR=1.003), p=0.895
Adjusted logistic coef of treatment_olaparib on ORR (controlled for biomarkers, ECOG, age, etc) = 0.0130 (OR=1.013), p=0.62
Adjusted logistic coef of treatment_osimertinib on ORR (controlled for biomarkers, ECOG, age, etc) = -0.0344 (OR=0.966), p=0.193

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response varies with age_years (non-zero age×pembrolizumab interaction).
The effect of treatment_sotorasib on objective_response varies with age_years (non-zero age×sotorasib interaction).
The effect of treatment_olaparib on objective_response varies with age_years (non-zero age×olaparib interaction).
The effect of treatment_osimertinib on objective_response varies with age_years (non-zero age×osimertinib interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Age×treatment_pembrolizumab interaction coef=-0.0008, p=0.723
Age×treatment_sotorasib interaction coef=0.0006, p=0.801
Age×treatment_olaparib interaction coef=0.0032, p=0.216
Age×treatment_osimertinib interaction coef=-0.0012, p=0.649

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response is larger in female patients than in male patients (positive sex_female×pembrolizumab interaction).
The effect of treatment_sotorasib on objective_response differs by sex (non-zero sex_female×sotorasib interaction).
The effect of treatment_olaparib on objective_response differs by sex (non-zero sex_female×olaparib interaction).
The effect of treatment_osimertinib on objective_response differs by sex (non-zero sex_female×osimertinib interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Sex×treatment_pembrolizumab interaction coef=0.1457, p=0.00237
Sex×treatment_sotorasib interaction coef=0.0004, p=0.993
Sex×treatment_olaparib interaction coef=-0.0542, p=0.299
Sex×treatment_osimertinib interaction coef=-0.0276, p=0.6

proposed_hypotheses.text: Greater prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Longer years_since_diagnosis is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative effect).
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with prior_immunotherapy=1 have a different objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with prior_targeted_therapy=1 have a different objective_response rate than those without.

analyses.result_summary: Logistic coef of prior_lines_of_therapy on ORR = -0.0123 (OR=0.988), p=0.244
Logistic coef of years_since_diagnosis on ORR = -0.0070 (OR=0.993), p=0.318

Logistic coef of prior_immunotherapy on ORR = 0.0297 (OR=1.030), p=0.376
Logistic coef of prior_targeted_therapy on ORR = 0.0381 (OR=1.039), p=0.296

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response differs between squamous and adenocarcinoma histology (non-zero histology_squamous×pembrolizumab interaction).
The effect of treatment_osimertinib on objective_response differs between squamous and adenocarcinoma histology (non-zero histology_squamous×osimertinib interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Squamous×treatment_pembrolizumab interaction coef=0.0297, p=0.575
Squamous×treatment_osimertinib interaction coef=0.0468, p=0.42

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for clinical covariates and other treatment-biomarker interactions, the pembrolizumab×pdl1_tps interaction remains positive and significant.
After multivariable adjustment, the pembrolizumab×tmb_high interaction remains positive and significant.
After multivariable adjustment, the pembrolizumab×stk11_mutation interaction remains negative and significant.
After multivariable adjustment, the osimertinib×egfr_mutation interaction is positive and significant.
After multivariable adjustment, the sotorasib×kras_g12c interaction is positive and significant.
After multivariable adjustment, the olaparib×brca2_mutation interaction is positive and significant.

analyses.result_summary: In multivariable model with all treatments and biomarkers, pembro_x_pdl1 coef=0.5935 (OR=1.810), p=1.73e-07
In multivariable model with all treatments and biomarkers, pembro_x_tmb coef=0.1735 (OR=1.189), p=0.000951
In multivariable model with all treatments and biomarkers, pembro_x_stk11 coef=-0.2047 (OR=0.815), p=0.00264
In multivariable model with all treatments and biomarkers, osi_x_egfr coef=0.0288 (OR=1.029), p=0.714
In multivariable model with all treatments and biomarkers, sot_x_kras coef=0.0621 (OR=1.064), p=0.409
In multivariable model with all treatments and biomarkers, ola_x_brca2 coef=-0.1553 (OR=0.856), p=0.343

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite 'immune-positive' indicator (immune_pos = pdl1_tps>=0.5 OR tmb_high=1) interacts positively with treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response — i.e., pembrolizumab benefit is concentrated in patients who are PDL1-high or TMB-high.

analyses.result_summary: Pembro×ImmunePositive(PDL1>=0.5 OR TMB-high) coef=0.1913, p=6.79e-05. ORR pembro/immune+=0.189 vs no-pembro/immune+=0.163; pembro/immune-=0.162 vs no-pembro/immune-=0.165
